translations.hi: मैं तुम्हारे बारे में सोच रहा हूँ।
translations.ja: あなたのことを考えています。

tokens.explanation: Subject clitic pronoun, 1st person singular; elided before a vowel-initial word.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; takes 'une pensée' as direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'pensée'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'ai'.
Preposition introducing the beneficiary PP 'pour toi'.
Stressed personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; object of the preposition 'pour'.

translations.en: That thought comes back to me often.
translations.es: Ese pensamiento vuelve a mí a menudo.
translations.de: Dieser Gedanke kommt mir oft wieder in den Sinn.
translations.it: Quel pensiero mi torna spesso in mente.
translations.zh-Hans: 那个念头常常又浮现出来。
translations.yue: 嗰個念頭成日都會再浮現。
translations.ru: Эта мысль часто возвращается ко мне.
translations.pt: Esse pensamento volta para mim com frequência.
translations.he: המחשבה הזאת חוזרת אליי לעיתים קרובות.
translations.tr: Bu düşünce sık sık aklıma geliyor.
translations.vi: Ý nghĩ đó thường quay lại với tôi.
translations.nl: Die gedachte komt vaak bij me terug.
translations.uk: Ця думка часто повертається до мене.
translations.hu: Ez a gondolat gyakran visszatér hozzám.
translations.hi: वह विचार अक्सर मेरे मन में लौट आता है।
translations.pl: Ta myśl często do mnie wraca.
translations.el: Αυτή η σκέψη επιστρέφει συχνά στο μυαλό μου.
translations.nb: Den tanken kommer ofte tilbake til meg.
translations.id: Pikiran itu sering kembali kepada saya.
translations.sv: Den tanken kommer ofta tillbaka till mig.
translations.cs: Ta myšlenka se ke mně často vrací.
translations.da: Den tanke vender ofte tilbage til mig.
translations.ja: その考えはよく頭に浮かびます。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'pensée'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of 'revient'.
Clitic pronoun, 1st person singular; indirect object (à moi) with 'revenir'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive verb taking an experiencer 'me'.
Adverb of frequency; modifies the verb 'revient'.

sentences.target: Je note ma pensée sur un carnet.
sentences.reading: /ʒə nɔt ma pɑ̃se syʁ œ̃ kaʁnɛ/

translations.fr: Je note ma pensée sur un carnet.
translations.ipa: /ʒə nɔt ma pɑ̃se syʁ œ̃ kaʁnɛ/
translations.en: I write down my thought in a notebook.
translations.es: Anoto mi pensamiento en una libreta.
translations.de: Ich schreibe den Gedanken in ein Notizbuch.
translations.it: Scrivo il mio pensiero su un taccuino.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把这个想法记在笔记本上。
translations.yue: 我將呢個念頭寫落筆記簿度。
translations.ru: Я записываю эту мысль в блокнот.
translations.pt: Eu anoto esse pensamento em um caderno.
translations.vi: Tôi ghi lại ý nghĩ đó vào sổ tay.
translations.nl: Ik schrijf die gedachte in een notitieboek.
translations.uk: Я записую цю думку в зошит.
translations.hu: Leírom ezt a gondolatot egy füzetbe.
translations.hi: मैं उस विचार को एक नोटबुक में लिखता हूँ।
translations.el: Σημειώνω αυτήν τη σκέψη σε ένα σημειωματάριο.
translations.nb: Jeg skriver ned tanken i en notatbok.
translations.id: Saya menuliskan pikiran itu di sebuah buku catatan.
translations.sv: Jag skriver ner tanken i en anteckningsbok.
translations.cs: Zapisuji si tu myšlenku do sešitu.
translations.da: Jeg skriver tanken ned i en notesbog.
translations.ja: その考えをノートに書き留めます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, selects 'ma pensée' as direct object.
Possessive determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'pensée'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'note'.
Preposition introducing the locative PP 'sur un carnet'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'carnet'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: Une pensée me réveille la nuit.

translations.fr: Une pensée me réveille la nuit.
translations.en: A thought wakes me up at night.
translations.es: Un pensamiento me despierta por la noche.
translations.it: Un pensiero mi sveglia di notte.
translations.zh-Hans: 一个念头在夜里把我惊醒。
translations.yue: 有個念頭喺夜晚會令我醒嚟。
translations.pt: Um pensamento me acorda à noite.
translations.vi: Một ý nghĩ đánh thức tôi vào ban đêm.
translations.nl: Een gedachte maakt me 's nachts wakker.
translations.hi: रात में एक विचार मुझे जगा देता है।
translations.el: Μια σκέψη με ξυπνά τη νύχτα.
translations.nb: En tanke vekker meg om natten.
translations.id: Sebuah pikiran membangunkan saya di malam hari.
translations.sv: En tanke väcker mig på natten.
translations.da: En tanke vækker mig om natten.
translations.ja: ある考えが夜中に私を目覚めさせます。
